title: Eigenstate and Eigenvalue Metadata
description: Schema for storing metadata of eigenstates and eigenvalues computed from a 1D Hamiltonian. Includes participation ratio and energy filtering criteria.

hamiltonian_id.description: Unique identifier (UUID or hash) linking to the source Hamiltonian in the HDF5 store.

eigenvalues.description: Array of eigenvalues E_i sorted in ascending order.

eigenstates_shape.description: Shape of the eigenstate matrix [L, L] where columns are eigenvectors.

participation_ratios.description: Participation Ratio PR_i for each eigenstate i. PR = (sum |psi|^2)^2 / sum |psi|^4. Ranges from 1 (fully localized) to L (fully delocalized).

energy_filter.description: Criteria used to select eigenstates for localization length analysis.

convergence_flags.description: True if the solver converged for the corresponding eigenstate.
